name: @radzor/smart-contract
description: Interact with EVM smart contracts via JSON-RPC. Read state, call functions, and send transactions.

inputs.name: rpcUrl
inputs.description: JSON-RPC endpoint URL (e.g. Infura, Alchemy, or local node).

outputs.name: callResult
outputs.description: Decoded return value from the contract call.

events.name: onCallResult
events.description: Fired on successful contract read call.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired on JSON-RPC or ABI error.

actions.name: call
actions.description: Read-only call to a view/pure contract function.

actions.name: encodeFunctionData
actions.description: ABI-encode a function call for use in a raw transaction.

actions.name: decodeFunctionResult

params.name: data
params.description: Hex-encoded return data from the call.

actions.description: ABI-decode return data from a contract call.

llm.constraints: Requires an Ethereum JSON-RPC endpoint (Infura, Alchemy, or local node). ABI must match the deployed contract. Sending transactions requires a funded private key.
